metadata.name: agg_orders
metadata.comment: Order-level aggregation combining fact_orders (status/SLA) and summed item measures from fact_order_items. Serves as the reconciliation layer between item and order facts, and as a business-ready order-level KPI table for BI consumption.

order_purchase_date_key.name: order_purchase_date_key
order_purchase_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the order purchase date, FK to dim_date.

order_approved_date_key.name: order_approved_date_key
order_approved_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the order approval date. Null if not yet approved.

order_delivered_customer_date_key.name: order_delivered_customer_date_key
order_delivered_customer_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the actual delivery date. Null if not yet delivered.

order_estimated_delivery_date_key.name: order_estimated_delivery_date_key
order_estimated_delivery_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the estimated delivery date.

is_delivered.name: is_delivered
is_delivered.comment: True if the order has a recorded delivery date.

delivery_days.name: delivery_days
delivery_days.comment: Number of days between order purchase and customer delivery. Null when the order has not yet been delivered.

delivery_delay_days.name: delivery_delay_days
delivery_delay_days.comment: Difference in days between estimated and actual delivery date (estimated - delivered). Positive = early, negative = late. Null when either date is missing.

is_delivered_on_time.name: is_delivered_on_time
is_delivered_on_time.comment: True if delivered on or before the estimated date. Null when either date is missing.

order_has_items.name: order_has_items
order_has_items.comment: True if the order has at least one associated item in fact_order_items. Used as a data quality flag to surface orders without item records.

order_items_qty.name: order_items_qty
order_items_qty.comment: Total number of items in the order. Coalesced to 0 for orders without items.

order_items_price.name: order_items_price
order_items_price.comment: Sum of item prices across all items in the order, excluding freight.

order_freight.name: order_freight
order_freight.comment: Sum of freight costs across all items in the order.

order_gmv.name: order_gmv
order_gmv.comment: Total gross merchandise value of the order (sum of item_gmv = price + freight).

avg_gmv_per_item.name: avg_gmv_per_item
avg_gmv_per_item.comment: Average GMV per item within the order. Null when order_items_qty is zero.

num_bytes.label: Approximate Size
num_bytes.description: Approximate size of table as reported by BigQuery

num_rows.label: # Rows
num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: agg_sales_daily
metadata.comment: Daily sales KPIs aggregated by order_purchase_date_key (day), combining commercial metrics from fact_order_items and delivery/SLA KPIs from fact_orders.

order_purchase_date_key.name: order_purchase_date_key
order_purchase_date_key.comment: Surrogate date key (YYYYMMDD) for the purchase date.

orders_cnt.name: orders_cnt
orders_cnt.comment: Count of distinct orders (from fact_order_items) for the day.

items_cnt.name: items_cnt
items_cnt.comment: Total quantity of items sold for the day.

items_price_sum.name: items_price_sum
items_price_sum.comment: Sum of item prices for the day.

freight_sum.name: freight_sum
freight_sum.comment: Sum of freight values for the day.

gmv_sum.name: gmv_sum
gmv_sum.comment: Gross merchandise value (items + freight) sum for the day.

avg_order_value.name: avg_order_value
avg_order_value.comment: Average GMV per order for the day (gmv_sum / orders_cnt).

avg_item_value.name: avg_item_value
avg_item_value.comment: Average GMV per item unit for the day (gmv_sum / items_cnt).

delivered_orders_cnt.name: delivered_orders_cnt
delivered_orders_cnt.comment: Count of delivered orders for the day (from fact_orders).

on_time_orders_cnt.name: on_time_orders_cnt
on_time_orders_cnt.comment: Count of on-time delivered orders for the day (from fact_orders).

orders_in_fact_cnt.name: orders_in_fact_cnt
orders_in_fact_cnt.comment: Sanity check - total orders count in fact_orders for the day.

num_bytes.label: Approximate Size
num_bytes.description: Approximate size of table as reported by BigQuery

num_rows.label: # Rows
num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: agg_seller_monthly
metadata.comment: Monthly seller-level performance model. Grain: one row per seller_key per year_month. Combines item-level commercial metrics and order-level delivery KPIs without double counting.

year_month.name: year_month
year_month.comment: Year-month in YYYYMM format derived from order_purchase_date_key.

orders_cnt.name: orders_cnt
orders_cnt.comment: Number of distinct orders containing items from the seller in the month.

items_cnt.name: items_cnt
items_cnt.comment: Total quantity of items sold by the seller in the month.

freight_sum.name: freight_sum
freight_sum.comment: Total freight value associated with the seller's items.

gmv_sum.name: gmv_sum
gmv_sum.comment: Gross Merchandise Value (item_price + freight) for the seller in the month.

avg_order_value.name: avg_order_value
avg_order_value.comment: Average GMV per distinct order for the seller in the month.

avg_item_value.name: avg_item_value
avg_item_value.comment: Average GMV per item sold by the seller in the month.

delivered_orders_cnt.name: delivered_orders_cnt
delivered_orders_cnt.comment: Number of delivered orders for the seller in the month.

on_time_orders_cnt.name: on_time_orders_cnt
on_time_orders_cnt.comment: Number of orders delivered on or before estimated delivery date.

on_time_rate.name: on_time_rate
on_time_rate.comment: Ratio of on-time delivered orders to total delivered orders.

num_bytes.label: Approximate Size
num_bytes.description: Approximate size of table as reported by BigQuery

num_rows.label: # Rows
num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: dim_customers
metadata.comment: Customer dimension with surrogate key generated via dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key.

customer_key.name: customer_key
customer_key.comment: Surrogate key generated from customer_id via dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: Transaction-level customer identifier. A customer may have multiple customer_ids across orders.

customer_unique_id.name: customer_unique_id
customer_unique_id.comment: Stable identifier representing the same real customer across multiple orders.

customer_zip_code_prefix.name: customer_zip_code_prefix
customer_zip_code_prefix.comment: 5-digit ZIP code prefix used for geographic analysis.

customer_city.name: customer_city
customer_city.comment: Customer city (trimmed and lowercased in staging).

customer_state.name: customer_state
customer_state.comment: Customer state (UF, trimmed and uppercased in staging).

load_date.name: load_date
load_date.comment: Batch partition date from which this record was selected as the latest state.

ingestion_ts.name: ingestion_ts
ingestion_ts.comment: Ingestion timestamp used as secondary ordering for latest record selection.

source_file.name: source_file
source_file.comment: Source file name from the ingestion batch.

source_uri.name: source_uri
source_uri.comment: Full GCS URI of the source file from the ingestion batch.

num_bytes.label: Approximate Size
num_bytes.description: Approximate size of table as reported by BigQuery

num_rows.label: # Rows
num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: fact_order_items
metadata.comment: Fact table at order item grain (order_id, order_item_id) with additive measures.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.comment: Order identifier (degenerate dimension, preserved for drill-down and reconciliation).

order_item_id.name: order_item_id
order_item_id.comment: Sequential item number within the order (degenerate dimension).

product_key.name: product_key
product_key.comment: Surrogate FK to dim_products, generated via dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key.

seller_key.name: seller_key
seller_key.comment: Surrogate FK to dim_sellers, generated via dbt_utils.generate_surrogate_key.

customer_key.name: customer_key
customer_key.comment: Surrogate FK to dim_customers, derived from the parent order's customer_id.

order_purchase_date_key.name: order_purchase_date_key
order_purchase_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the order purchase date, FK to dim_date.

shipping_limit_date_key.name: shipping_limit_date_key
shipping_limit_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the item shipping deadline, FK to dim_date.

item_qty.name: item_qty
item_qty.comment: Item quantity. Always 1 — each row represents a single item unit.

item_price.name: item_price
item_price.comment: Selling price of the item, excluding freight.

item_freight.name: item_freight
item_freight.comment: Freight cost charged for this item.

item_gmv.name: item_gmv
item_gmv.comment: Gross merchandise value for this item (item_price + item_freight).

num_bytes.label: Approximate Size
num_bytes.description: Approximate size of table as reported by BigQuery

num_rows.label: # Rows
num_rows.description: Approximate count of rows in this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

order_approved_date_key.name: order_approved_date_key
order_approved_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the order approval date. Null if not yet approved.

order_delivered_customer_date_key.name: order_delivered_customer_date_key
order_delivered_customer_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the actual delivery date. Null if not yet delivered.

order_estimated_delivery_date_key.name: order_estimated_delivery_date_key
order_estimated_delivery_date_key.comment: Date key (YYYYMMDD) of the estimated delivery date.

is_delivered.name: is_delivered
is_delivered.comment: True if the order has a recorded delivery date.

delivery_days.name: delivery_days
delivery_days.comment: Number of days between order purchase and customer delivery. Null when the order has not yet been delivered.

delivery_delay_days.name: delivery_delay_days
delivery_delay_days.comment: Difference in days between estimated and actual delivery date (estimated - delivered). Positive = early, negative = late. Null when either date is missing.

is_delivered_on_time.name: is_delivered_on_time
is_delivered_on_time.comment: True if delivered on or before the estimated date. Null when either date is missing.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.comment: Unique identifier of the order (current state).

order_purchase_ts.name: order_purchase_ts
order_purchase_ts.comment: Timestamp when the order was created.

order_purchase_dt.name: order_purchase_dt
order_purchase_dt.comment: Order creation date derived from order_purchase_ts.

order_approved_ts.name: order_approved_ts
order_approved_ts.comment: Timestamp when the order was approved.

order_delivered_carrier_ts.name: order_delivered_carrier_ts
order_delivered_carrier_ts.comment: Timestamp when the order was handed to the carrier.

order_delivered_customer_ts.name: order_delivered_customer_ts
order_delivered_customer_ts.comment: Timestamp when the order was delivered to the customer.

load_date.name: load_date
load_date.comment: Batch partition date used as primary ordering to identify the latest record per order.

ingestion_ts.name: ingestion_ts
ingestion_ts.comment: Ingestion timestamp used as secondary ordering for latest selection.

source_file.name: source_file
source_file.comment: Source file name used during ingestion.

source_uri.name: source_uri
source_uri.comment: Source file URI used during ingestion.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table
